metadata.title:
HILL HAS ALL


KINDS OF CARS

pages.raw_text:
In his reply to the interstate
commerce committee concerning
the scarcity of cars, j. ]. Hill stated
the $60,000,000 bond issue contem-
plated by the Great Northern is in
tended to provided additional track
age and equipment, new lines and
terminals being under considera-
ton.


He claims there are plenty of
cars in spite of the fact that grain
growers are unable to ship their
product or procure fuel. Hill says
dealers have neglected to lay in
winter supplies of fuel.


Spokane dealers have tried since
last June to lay in supplies.


The inquiry at Minneapolis has
developed the fact that from 10 to
13 days are now required to move
a freight train $50 miles.
